title: carpha alpina var. schoenoides
intro: Carpha alpina var. schoenoides, also known as Alpine Carpha or Alpine Sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and expectorant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as soothing skin irritations and wounds. Alpine Carpha is often prepared as an infusion or decoction, and can also be used as a tincture, to utilize its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
